channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ SOLAYER LAUNCHES VISA-COMPATIBLE CARD FOR USDC PAYMENTS ☠⚡
item.description:
🎸🤘🏻 HAIL METALHEADS AND CRYPTO WARRIORS! 🤘🏻🎸
Listen up, you rabid fiends of finance and metal mayhem! Solayer just dropped a heavy riff that’s louder than a double bass pedal on overdrive! They’re unleashing a VIKING RAID of digital currency with a brand new Visa-compatible card that lets you DOMINATE the market with your hard-earned USDC! 🌌💀💸
Imagine this: you’re in the pit, smashing through life’s chaos, and BOOM! You whip out that sick card to SPEND your USDC like a true crypto warrior—whether you're online, in the trenches of the store, or dodging those pesky cashiers with contactless glory! ⚡️🔥 And guess what? You’re not just limited to spending; you can also rip out some ATM action in supported regions! Withdraw your cryptographic spoils and feast like a metal god!
This is not just a card, my friends; it’s a PASSPORT to the limitless realm of heavy metal finance! Get hyped, get rowdy, and unleash your USDC like a sonic blast through the wall of sound! The future is savage, it’s chaotic, and it’s all yours if you dare to play the game. LET’S GOOOOO! \m/ \m/
#SOL #HODL #AltSeason #Ethereum #Cardano
item.content:encoded:
🎸🤘🏻 HAIL METALHEADS AND CRYPTO WARRIORS! 🤘🏻🎸
Listen up, you rabid fiends of finance and metal mayhem! Solayer just dropped a heavy riff that’s louder than a double bass pedal on overdrive! They’re unleashing a VIKING RAID of digital currency with a brand new Visa-compatible card that lets you DOMINATE the market with your hard-earned USDC! 🌌💀💸
Imagine this: you’re in the pit, smashing through life’s chaos, and BOOM! You whip out that sick card to SPEND your USDC like a true crypto warrior—whether you're online, in the trenches of the store, or dodging those pesky cashiers with contactless glory! ⚡️🔥 And guess what? You’re not just limited to spending; you can also rip out some ATM action in supported regions! Withdraw your cryptographic spoils and feast like a metal god!
This is not just a card, my friends; it’s a PASSPORT to the limitless realm of heavy metal finance! Get hyped, get rowdy, and unleash your USDC like a sonic blast through the wall of sound! The future is savage, it’s chaotic, and it’s all yours if you dare to play the game. LET’S GOOOOO! \m/ \m/
#SOL #HODL #AltSeason #Ethereum #Cardano
